_comment: Parallax checkpoint layer - sensor plane (006). DRAFT pending S1 verification (examples/spike_hooks.md): the mcp_tool handler payload/result mapping is the documented shape, not yet live-verified. Merge the 'hooks' object into your .claude/settings.json. Off by default: nothing invokes the checkpoint tools until you install this. Uninstall = remove these entries; nothing else changes. All hooks fail open - a dead server never blocks your session.
